context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct `tessl skill review` command in the automation script, runs it both before and after changes, structures the workflow so validation happens before changes are applied, and incorporates multiple validation methods from Phase 4.

checklist.name: tessl skill review command
checklist.description: Script uses `tessl skill review <path>` (exact command name) for the evaluation step — not a generic alternative

checklist.name: Review before changes
checklist.description: Script runs `tessl skill review` BEFORE making any changes to capture the baseline score

checklist.name: Review after changes
checklist.description: Script runs `tessl skill review` a SECOND TIME after changes are applied to verify improvement

checklist.name: Validation before apply
checklist.description: Script includes a validation step that is placed BEFORE the change/edit step in the workflow

checklist.name: Python ast.parse validation
checklist.description: Script includes Python syntax validation using `ast.parse` or `python -c 'import ast; ...'` — specifically the ast module

checklist.name: node --check JS validation
checklist.description: Script includes JavaScript syntax validation using `node --check <file>` command

checklist.name: Command --help flag validation
checklist.description: Script validates command flags by consulting the command's `--help` output

checklist.name: File reference validation
checklist.description: Script checks that file references in the SKILL.md actually exist on disk

checklist.name: Before/after score output
checklist.description: Script captures or outputs both the before and after scores side-by-side, enabling comparison

checklist.name: Script accepts SKILL.md path
checklist.description: Script accepts the SKILL.md path as an argument (e.g. `$1` or script parameter), not hardcoded

checklist.name: Phases are ordered
checklist.description: Script structure follows: baseline review → validation → (change step) → post-change review, in that order
